name: Crock Pot Spanish Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in a skillet and drain off any excess fat.
2. Add all ingredients to the crock pot.
3. Stir thoroughly.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours or on High for 3 hours.
5. Optionally, stir in cheese and sprinkle on top before serving.
